bookshelf.helpContent:
• Favorites and bookshelf are linked: favoriting a comic adds it to the bookshelf; only removing it from all favorite folders unfavorites it.
• On comic detail page, unfavorite removes it from all favorite folders at once.
• Same for downloads: only removing a comic from all download folders deletes its downloaded files.

webdavSync.title: Cloud Sync Config
webdavSync.noneTip: Please select a sync service in global settings first, then return here to fill in the configuration.
webdavSync.pathStyleSubtitle: Self-hosted MinIO usually requires this option
webdavSync.webdavConnectFailed:
Connection failed. Please check network or WebDAV address.
$error
webdavSync.invalidPort: Invalid port. Please enter a number between 0 and 65535.
webdavSync.s3ConnectFailed:
Connection failed. Please check S3 configuration.
$error
webdavSync.faqMarkdown:
### What can be synced?
- Currently syncs Bika history, JM favorites, and JM history.

### How to configure WebDAV?
- Fill in WebDAV URL, username, password, then tap Test & Save.

### How to configure S3?
- Endpoint examples: `s3.amazonaws.com`, `s3.filebase.com`, `play.min.io`.
- For self-hosted MinIO, fill in a custom port and disable SSL if necessary.

### How often does auto-sync run?
- Every 5 minutes.

### How to trigger a manual sync?
- Tap Test & Save on the sync config page.
- Or toggle the auto-sync switch in global settings.

realSr.title: Image Super-Resolution (Experimental)
realSr.autoUpscaleSubtitleUnavailable: Model not downloaded; auto upscale will not work
realSr.autoUpscaleSubtitleAvailable: Automatically upscale when downloading or loading images
realSr.resolutionThresholdSubtitle: Only auto-upscale when image width is below this value
realSr.concurrencySubtitle: Higher values suit high-end GPUs; mobile/low-end devices should keep it at 1
realSr.tileSizeSubtitle: Set smaller if crashes occur; 0 means no tiling; desktop can try 0
realSr.modelSubtitle: Switching model family resets variant options
realSr.noiseLevelSubtitle: This option varies with the selected model
realSr.blockInfoTooltip:
blockSize is the model input size including reflection padding;
content block = blockSize - 2×shrinkSize, which is the actual拼接 output region.
realSr.blockInfoFormat: Content block $contentSize×$contentSize, model input $blockSize×$blockSize (with ${shrinkSize}px reflection padding)
realSr.androidSuperResolutionSubtitle: Currently uses waifu2x upconv anime model, 2x upscale
realSr.desktopStrategySubtitle: Efficiency priority uses waifu2x; quality priority uses Real-CUGAN
realSr.desktopNoiseLevelSubtitle: Conservative suits normal comics; higher levels produce stronger smearing
realSr.coremlInputHint: Enter input image absolute path or asset path
realSr.coremlStatusFillInput: Please fill in the input image path
realSr.coremlStatusNoModelFile: No model files available for current family
